Please help me regarding this

entry.title: Re: How to determine the date a quote item was last modified?
entry.content: Hi, Is your tenant provisioned in Quote 1.0 or Quote 2.0?

entry.title: What is the use of Retention Period for Scores
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Could you please explain what is the use of Retention Period for Scores

what will happen if i select

Scores Saved = Monthly

Retention Period for Scores = 2 days

Regards,

Amshu

entry.title: Re: Do Virtual Tables support ST_POINT or ST_GEOMETRY
entry.content: oh, I see you are using a HANA Express (=HANA on-prem) as a remote source. Then you are right - spatial datatypes are not supported and you can workaround as you suggested via converting it to TEXT/WKT and back.

entry.title: Re: GRC Firefighter Idle Session Timeout
entry.content: Dear Ken, do you find any solution for this issue ?

entry.title: Re: Two different DM Custom View Plugins are mistakenly c...
entry.content:
Hi Kevin, thanks for your quick reply.

Of course we use your Yoeman tool which does a great job 👍
To help future beginners I would recommend documenting the attribute somewhere to clarify what it is for. In my research I have not found anything on this topic in the official documentation. In the Developer's Guide it is used a few times in code snippets but is always “false” and is never explained further. Even though the attribute name sounds descriptive, a clarification would always help me.

You have already correctly identified the problem with the second point. The problem is that the same text is displayed in the POD Designer, but these are two completely different plugins (with different i18n/builder.properties), which should have nothing to do with each other. DM is therefore incorrectly merging the Plugins here. Our test case above was that we created two plugins with the Yoeman generator. One plugin is called “peggingGraph” and one “peggingGraphZwo”. Two plugins with different names, namespaces, builder.properties, ID's etc. Nevertheless, only one text is displayed in the POD Designer (sometimes the text from the builder.properties of the first plugin is displayed, sometimes from the second). As a result, only one plugin can be added at a time in the Designer.
=> So two different plugins that are incorrectly combined

thanks, Max

entry.title: Re: Alternative to I_InventoryPriceByKeyDate
entry.content: Hi Owen, this article did not really provide an if there is an alternative to the CDS View that I need. Best, Joelle

entry.title: Re: What is the use of Retention Period for Scores
entry.content:
Hello @rajanikanth111, Amshu,

Long time! Hope all well at your end.

If you select Scores Saved = Monthly and Retention Period for Scores = 2 days, the system will save scores monthly but will only keep these scores for 2 days. ie.e the saved scores will be deleted soon after they are generated and stored, potentially making them unavailable for future analysis or reporting.

I hope this help answering your query and closing thread.
Thanks and Regards,
Kunal Bansal
SAP CX Solution Architect
------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: RFC Timeout Failure for PO Rejection from FIORI app - workflow
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are using our own Workflow tasks for PO approval and rejection .

It was working fine before upgrade but after we moved from 1909 to 2023 , The Approval option is working fine but the Rejection option is getting the RFC Timeout error although the RFC is working fine.

/IWFND/ERROR_LOG shows 'RFC call was not successful because of system failure 'Time limit exceeded''.

Did Anyone face issue like this before , any help will be appreciated .

Thank You !

Margit

entry.title: Build the Skills to Bring out Your Best: SAP TechEd Virtual – Learning Zone Is Now Live!
entry.content:
Calling all tech enthusiasts! With SAP TechEd Virtual being just around the corner, it’s time to get ahead of the game and build the skills to bring out your best. Join a community of experts, acquire in-demand skills, and prepare for a globally recognized certification with self-paced learning in the SAP TechEd Virtual – Learning zone – even before the main event starts on October 8!

Learning tools and opportunities for you:

  • Get started with 40 interactive value journeys and showcases to discover the value of SAP solutions.
  • Access 45 free, self-paced learning journeys curated to each of the content tracks of SAP TechEd Virtual to upskill in the latest SAP solutions. 
  • Subscribe to premium, guided learning resources with SAP Learning Hub to maximize your skills and earn a globally recognized certification, with an exclusive 25% discount.
  • Access demos and 25 basic trials to explore the power of SAP solutions and 50 use cases to get hands-on experience.
  • Connect with experts, expand your network, and collaborate with peers in dedicated learning groups and bridge the time until October 8 with SAP Community events.

Explore learning offerings for each SAP TechEd track:

  • Digital Transformation with Cloud ERP 
  • SAP Business Technology Platform
  • Artificial Intelligence
  • Application Development and Automation
  • Data and Analytics
  • Integration

Register for SAP TechEd Virtual to benefit from a 25% discount on SAP Learning Hub:

 As a registered SAP TechEd Virtual attendee, you can benefit from an exclusive 25% discount on your SAP Learning Hub subscription! Once you have subscribed to our guided premium learning offering, you can get access to learning content and certification exam attempts, expert guidance in digital live sessions and on-demand hands-on practice systems too.

We know that learning is vital – now more than ever. Jump to the SAP TechEd Virtual – Learning zone today to get a head start into SAP TechEd in 2024.

See you all at SAP TechEd Virtual – Learning zone, and beyond!

entry.title: How to Block a Ship-to Location in SAP ByDesign
entry.content:
How to Block a Ship-to Location in SAP ByDesign

Dear SAP Support,

Could you please guide me on how to block a Ship-to Location?

With the 2408 update in ByDesign, a change was introduced titled "Create Stock Transfer Orders for Materials with Blocked Ship-To Locations." I would like to test this update on my system, but I am not sure how to set a Location to Blocked status.

Could you please provide a step-by-step guide on how to do this, including the specific Workcenter and View that should be used?

Thank you for your assistance.

 

https://help.sap.com/whats-new/2e5f185568e744db82065313bbbcc6ae?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )

entry.title: Re: Creating Freight unit stages for TM public cloud
SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Ed.: Flexible Workflow - Emails are not being sent
entry.content:
Hi, 

I want emails to be sent when a project billing request is approved or rejected to the person who triggered the workflow. 

What I already did: 

  • Created to Email Templates form the predefined Template "SWF_WORKFLOW_COMPLETE_NOTIFY" with the name "YY1_01800259_COMPLETE_NEGATIVE" and "YY1_01800259_COMPLETE_POSITIVE". 
  • I have worked through this documentary (defining allowed email sender/receiver domains etc.): https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/S4C/Library/Setup/1LQ_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf

If I create an Email Template with the Name YY1_01800259_CRT_ALL an Email is trigged as you can see in this Screenshot: 

But nothing happens with the templates YY1_01800259_COMPLETE_POSITIVE and YY1_01800259_COMPLETE_NEGATIVE. 

Can someone please help me with this? 

Thanks in advance! 

 

Theresa

entry.title: Re: SAC Content Transport (Migration) Using CTMS
entry.content:
Hi @DevM98 ,

According to my understanding, the transport of SAP Analytics Cloud Network Package content is not supported for SAP Cloud Transport Management instances running on SAP Cloud ALM tenants. This has been one reason to come up with the guidance to use standalone instances of SAP Cloud Transport Management service together with SAP Cloud ALM, as outlined here: New Integration of SAP Cloud Transport Management ... - SAP Community

If you want to move an existing setup to this new recommendation, here is also a blog post around this topic: How to migrate an SAP Cloud Transport Management i... - SAP Community

Best regards,
Boris

entry.title: Re: Creating Freight unit stages for TM public cloud
entry.content: Hi, Does SAP public cloud support the external planning of freight bookings, or is this only supported for freight orders? Meaning is it possible to have a trasnportation plan (multiple stages) when working with an external planning tool in public cloud

entry.title: Re: How to include a URL to access the SAP WF approval screen in the notification e-mail
entry.content: Hi Thank you. I guess in the screenshot you opened the workflow definition in PFWS. Deep link over CDS view I_WorkflowTaskURL provides WorkflowTaskURL for a workflow task instance (WorkflowTaskInternalID) = workitem id for the User Decision Task.

entry.title: consume an service from a cap appliaction to a another cap application
entry.content:
I have two applications deployed in CF/Kyma within different subaccounts under the same global account. Application 1 contains a product app, 
and Application 2 contains an order app and is using the portal service. I want to integrate these such that, when I open the portal in Application 2, the product app tile from Application 1 is visible.
 
How can I achieve this? Could you provide any blogs or resources related to this process?

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
Implementation will not be called
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have created a BADI with multiple use is checked in SE18. However, in SE19, the multiple use is unclick and the implementation will not be called. What steps should I do in order to make this BADI is called? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Schedules for Maintenance Deliveries is moving to SAP for Me
entry.content:
The calendar it's a nightmare... So to find the release date for a product, I need to filter by text and moving month by month, or going to the "Maintenance Deliveries" tab which only displays a year and in small boxes by quarter, I can't search/filter by a product.

Now I'm trying to search the delivery date for S/4HANA 2025, and it's impossible. I search for every month in 2025.

Why every time SAP change something is worse?

The community page, SAP for Me, Universal ID, Schedules for Maintenance Deliveries

Please, think in the functionality when you build something, not just in "Oh, this could be pretty"

entry.title: Re: Printing an invoice based on existing correspondence type for journal entries with one customer
entry.content:
@StefanieSchulke 

Hello Stefanie,

Thank you for your feedback. Meanwhile, S/4HANA Cloud, public edition includes a new correspondence type SAP21 (FI Customer Invoice) which can be used instead of SAP09 for printing customer invoices. The new correspondence type SAP21 was specifically designed for printing customer invoices. Please find more information here: Printing of Customer Invoices in Financial Accounting (FI).

Unfortunately, neither of the two correspondence types SAP09 and SAP21 support a mass-print activity. So, it has to be printed per document. In the app Create Correspondence you can use the Copy function to reduce the steps when printing more than one invoice.

Additionally, you can also raise a feature request for printing customer invoices via a scheduled application job. Please follow the steps described in this article: 

2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

 

Best regards
Steffen

entry.title: Re: Automatic EDI Vendor Invoice creation in MM (LIV) through IDOC from Intercompany Billing
entry.content: What Andreas said was right. In the inbound parameter for partner LI(vendor), the Message Code should be MM, not FI instead. And, the Process code should be INVL, not INVF instead. Best Regards, Linux Gao

Keerthana

entry.title: how can to adding the ads in appgyver

entry.title: Re: Error BDEF "is not a lock entity" during generation o...
entry.content: If you want to build a draft enabled RAP BO, you need to add the total etag field. Otherwise, concurrency control is not possible.

entry.title: Re: Show Changeset error response from SAP RAP in UI
entry.content: did you find the answer for this?

entry.title: Re: Implementation will not be called
entry.content:
Did you really want to create a BAdI with SE18, then try to implement it with SE19, and not implement the standard BAdI ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST, BAdI which doesn't allow multiple implementations?

  • SE18 is only used by SAP almost all the time.
  • SE19 is used by SAP and customers

entry.title: Re: Gross weight and net weight fields are not showing in...
entry.content:
Those UoM come from Additional Data > Units of Measure.

Please check your setting there.

entry.title: Re: High Availability on Sap b1 HAna manual failover license manager primary server not working
entry.content: hdbadm@secondaryhana:/usr/sap/HDB/HDB00> hdbnsutil -sr_register --name=sh --remoteHost=PH --remoteInstance=00 -- replicationMode=syncmem parameter --replicationMode must be specified; failed. trace file nameserver_18.0.1.120.00000.000.trc may contain more error details.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
Cat Brawl APK 54.243 Free Download For Android 2024
entry.content:
What is Cat Brawl?

Cat Brawl is a fun and engaging mobile game where players pit adorable yet fierce cats against each other in battle. The game is designed around the idea of quirky, action-packed fights where different cat characters have unique abilities and personalities. Players can collect and upgrade their feline fighters, join multiplayer battles, and engage in various challenges. The game is popular among casual gamers who enjoy strategy and humor with a touch of cuteness.

Download here: Cat Brawl APK

Benefits of Using Cat Brawl

Cat Brawl offers a perfect balance between entertainment and strategy. It’s great for relaxing while sharpening your decision-making skills as you choose which cats to deploy in different battles. The game also fosters creativity with its varied cat characters, each with distinct looks and abilities. Additionally, the multiplayer aspect encourages social interactions, allowing users to team up or compete with friends worldwide.

Features of Cat Brawl

  • Character Variety: A wide range of cat fighters, each with its special abilities and quirky personalities.
  • Multiplayer Battles: Engage in real-time battles with players around the globe.
  • Upgrades and Customization: Players can upgrade their cats and equip them with different items to enhance their abilities.
  • Daily Challenges and Events: Frequent updates and events keep the gameplay fresh and exciting.

Is Cat Brawl Safe to Use?

Yes, Cat Brawl is generally safe to use. It is rated for all ages and does not contain any inappropriate content. However, like many mobile games, it may include in-app purchases and ads, so parental guidance is recommended for younger players.

Design and User Experience

The game features bright, colorful graphics with an easy-to-navigate interface. The design is playful, reflecting the humorous tone of the game, making it appealing to both kids and adults. The intuitive controls ensure a smooth gaming experience even for beginners.

Conclusion

Cat Brawl is a delightful mix of strategy, humor, and action. With its charming design, varied characters, and engaging gameplay, it offers hours of entertainment for cat lovers and casual gamers alike. The safe and user-friendly environment makes it accessible to all age groups.

Yuko TACHIBANA

entry.title: SAP B1 HANA MANUAL FAILOVER HIGH AVAILABILITY SYSTEM REPLICATION ERROR
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are doing implementation of High availability for our customer as per the Setting Up SAP HANA Database High Availability for SAP Business One 10.0 for Manual Failover documentation we are struck in the below step enable hana system replication on secondary server we are getting error message on executing the below command.

Cmd:hdbadm@secondaryhana:/usr/sap/HDB/HDB00> hdbnsutil -sr_register --name=sh --remoteHost=PH --remoteInstance=00 -- replicationMode=syncmem
Error Message: parameter --replicationMode must be specified;
failed. trace file nameserver_18.0.1.120.00000.000.trc may contain more error details.

Please check and let us know how to solve this error.

entry.title: Ariba to third party how to extract the attachments with cid in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

Introduction:

In SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI), handling MIME messages, especially when extracting PDFs or documents from a cid (Content-ID) reference within a URL tag, can be challenging and how to decode the attachment in CPI.

Understanding MIME Messages:

MIME (Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions) messages allow the inclusion of various media types (like PDFs, images, etc.) in email messages and other internet communications. In an SAP CPI context, these messages often need to be decoded and processed to extract attachments referenced by cid URLs.

 

The Challenge:

You might encounter a scenario where the MIME decoder does not work as expected in SAP CPI. This can be problematic when you need to extract embedded documents (like PDFs or DOCs) that are referenced by a cid in the URL tag of your XML payload.

Sample payload 

Content-Type: multipart/related; type="text/xml"; start="12345@domain.com"; boundary="boundary123"

 

--boundary123

Content-Type: text/xml; charset="utf-8"

Content-ID: <12345@domain.com>

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<cXML version="1.2.020" xml:lang="en-US">

    <Request>

        <InvoiceDetailRequest>

            <InvoiceDetailRequestHeader>

                <Comments>This is a comment [Attachment 1]</Comments>

            </InvoiceDetailRequestHeader>

            <Attachment>

                <URL>cid:attachment1.pdf</URL>

            </Attachment>

        </InvoiceDetailRequest>

    </Request>

</cXML>

 

--boundary123

Content-Type: application/pdf

Content-ID: <attachment1.pdf>

Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64

 

JVBERi0xLj

QKJcfs...

--boundary123--

 

Thanks,

Ajay Kumar

entry.title: Re: Monday Knowledge Snippet (MKS) - 37 TM 9.1 Load Planning
entry.content:
HI All,

 

My load planning is always at the center of Cargo and not at  the corner of the Truck, for example if I have 6 pallet then all are getting loaded in 1 row at the center and due to this its leaves small space only in each corner.

How can we make that loading should always start at the corner

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: HCM P&F Fiori - F4 help (in a popup format)
entry.content:
Hi,

Were you able to solve the problem?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Why is doing batch without stock while doing POGI?
entry.content:
HI,

assuming you don't want batches to be automatically determined, did you check the situation after you branch to the "Batch Split" screen?  I mean, after triggering a "New Batch Determination", the system should select only according to the rules set in your Batch Determination strategy (avoiding zero stock).

See also:

SAP Help Portal - Trigger Manual Batch Determination for Deliveries 

and this question answered:

SAP Community - How to display batches with stock only? 

br,

Marna

entry.title: Re: Building a Customizable Calculator Widget for SAC - Styling and Builder Panel
entry.content:
Hello,

your approach creates a Builder-Panel completely from scratch,
and removes the option of selecting a data-model, as well as its measures/dimensions/filters:

I am aware that in the context of a simple calculator, we don't need any data-model.

Nonetheless I was wondering if there is a way of just extending/appending custom inputs,
while keeping the option for selecting the model. E.g.: 



Thanks and best regards
Alexander

entry.title: EHS OCC settings are grouped differently in Prod and Pre-Prod systems
entry.content:
Hi guys,

We are using EHS OCC to upload regulatory data in several systems (Quality, Pre-prod and Prod) and we are defining a default filter for which data to upload. but the data tree is not shown and grouped same in different systems which makes it difficult to insure same data is uploaded in each system (see below example for product safety data), knowing that the OCC version is the exactly the same in both systems (SP61 and all software components are the same as well).  

Is there anyone of you who has this experience or know if there is any parameter that influence this grouping.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Advanced Financial Closing (AFC...
entry.content:
Hello,

This question was part of Finance Canape session scheduled in 2021. 

AFC is a standalone SAP BTP application and can be seamlessly integrated in heterogeneous systems landscapes to control closing tasks as a unified hub in distributed financial backend systems. You can learn more details on Advanced Financial Closing here- https://help.sap.com/docs/advanced-financial-closing?locale=en-US.
This scope needs additional products license. This scope item is a container for the Financial Tasklist Integration communication scenario (SAP_COM_0566). The communication scenario is managed by the customer. If your business needs require it, you can activate it and set up the integration. Please find additional details here-
Advanced Financial Closing Integration (‏4HG‏)(Information published on SAP site)

Thanks,

Cryssal

entry.title: Re: SAP SAC DataAction dimension Member property filter u...
entry.content:
I have a similar scenario with validation rules. A more suitable solution than using multiple properties would be most appreciated!

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Document obsolete in SAP Opentext
entry.content:
Hi,

In case if after obsoleting DP document in SWO1 you still see it in /OPT/VIM_WP, try running ABAP Report /OPT/CR_PMC_REG_UPDATE. It synchronizes the DP document data and adjusts the technical tables that hold workflow-relevant data used by VIM Workplace. It helped me in case when the workflow item was missing from the system (no longer available).

Otherwise, try using SWIA/SWI1 to see what's the status of the workflow item. If it is no longer needed, you can technically delete the workflow item by cancelling it.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Created CDS View Entity with added new concatenated field of total price and currency code and Overall status text field using Association.

Result :

Happy Learning! 😊

Thanks

entry.title: Re: IS THERE ANY ALTERNATIVE OF MC.9 IN PUBLIC CLOUD 2408
entry.content:
Hello @praneshti23 

Unfortunately there is not. 

The note 3126267 - What are successor Fiori apps for Inventory Controlling (Application 03) report like MC.9 in S/4HANA system? lists some inventory controlling Fiori apps but they are nowhere as useful as MC.9.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Process Diagram transfer between Signavio – Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi @Ajay88 ,

 

would you know how can we get the existing diagrams from Process Collaboration Hub to Process Manager?

In the SuccessFactors Collaboration Hub I have the possibility to export an existing (published by SAP) diagram only  into the PDF format and I would need them in the BPMN 2.0. XML format so that I can import them in the Process Manager

Thank you and kind regards,

Karolina

entry.title: Re: Implementation will not be called
entry.content: It's "SE18 is used by SAP and customers", it should be SE19 is used by SAP and customers, should it not?

entry.title: Re: Implementation will not be called
entry.content:
Hello @Catherine3 

You need to create a BAdI implementation with SE19. Then your implementation will be called.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Account 600002 in company code 2014 cannot be directly posted to
entry.content:
Account 600002 in company code 2014 cannot be directly posted to

THIS IS ACCOUNT DETERMINATION ERROR INVOICE ALREADY SAVE BUT ACCOUNT NOT CLEAR AND 600002 IS RECONCILLATION GL ACCOUNT

entry.title: Re: Implementation will not be called
entry.content: Yes 2nd line should been SE19 (corrected)

entry.title: Re: EHS OCC settings are grouped differently in Prod and...
entry.content:
Hi @dazeli 

In the PROD Screenshot, the "Globe/Earth" Button is not activated and therefore the regulations are not grouped by region.

The PRE-PROD has the "Globe/Earth" Button is activated and therefore the regulations are grouped by region.

If the "Globe/Earth" Button is activated might be a user specific setting - stored for each system...

Hope this helps

Mark

entry.title: New pilots to empower customers to leverage AI and SAP HANA Cloud capabilities to innovate faster
entry.content:
Artificial Intelligence or AI is disrupting business everywhere! Organizations are looking at ways to innovate and update their business processes to make best use of AI to make savings and add improved functionality to their customers. As we come to terms with AI’s vast potential, SAP has adjusted its strategy with the goal of becoming not only the leading enterprise application provider but also the number one business AI company. SAP provides opportunities to use AI to unlock new levels of efficiency and innovation in their customer’s businesses.

To support this strategy, in SAP Enterprise Support we are providing two upcoming pilots of Expert Guided Implementation services through the SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council program designed to empower customers with the knowledge and skills to leverage SAP HANA Cloud’s advanced capabilities and AI to improve efficiency and innovation in organizations.

Expert Guided Implementation (EGI) services are multi-day remote delivered sessions, delivered through by SAP Enterprise Support Academy and typically delivered over 3-5 working days. In short, this is a virtual classroom style session, where an SAP expert explains step-by-step the configuration of a set objective using training materials and step-by-step demonstration.

In our first pilot EGI service, we delve into Multiple Model Programming using the SAP HANA Vector Engine and explore how Generative AI, specifically Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), can transform customer’s data management and AI strategies. The service is designed to provide a comprehensive understanding of SAP HANA Cloud’s advanced features and how they can be leveraged to support cutting-edge AI applications. By the end of the service, customers will be equipped with skills to implement multiple model programming, utilize the Vector Engine, and enhance your AI models with Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG). Plus, insights into effective data tiering strategies to optimize data management will be provided.

In our second pilot EGI service, we equip customers with the skills and knowledge to harness the power of the SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) model in SAP HANA Cloud. The service will introduce you to SAP Build Code and Joule, SAP’s generative AI assistant, to streamline application development processes. The service provides with a comprehensive understanding of the SAP CAP model and how to effectively use SAP Build Code and Joule to accelerate your application development. By the end of the service, customers will have the skills to develop robust CAP applications, utilize SAP HANA Cloud for data management, and leverage generative AI to enhance your coding efficiency.

Please join us for this exciting journey into the world of Generative AI, Joule and SAP HANA Cloud and unlock new possibilities for your business! For further queries including how to join these pilots, reach out to the SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council directly at mailto:esac@sap.com.

Thanks and Regards,

Robert Kelly

BTP Lead – SAP Enterprise Support

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with Phase Model in Maintenance Management
entry.content:
Hi Gerhard,

Thanks for the update. I have one query, how one can restrict users to go to one phase to another without skipping any phase. I have just implemented New phase methodology for one of the client in Greenfield implementation. User are able to skip from scheduling to Dispatching without completing the scheduling phase. Already deselected skipping in Overall status config. Am i missing something or we need to go for development to block this as one can do direct TECO also right now.

Regards

Yogesh Sharma

entry.title: Re: How to increase message processing log retention period from default 30 days in SAP CPI
entry.content: SAP does not allow us to adjust the period of retention of logs more than 30 days and we found the solution was to we might retrieve older logs by raising a support ticket to LOD-HCI-PI-OPS we want to know is the logs date be permanent or can change from 30 days to more and with time after raising a ticket?? and can we raise this type of ticket again and again ticket or possible to extend the date of retention

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hi,

Task 2 is completed.

entry.title: How to properly refresh Object Page data when it's affected by req.on succeeded of draftActivation?
entry.content:
Hi colleagues

I'm trying to implement next scenario:

I have 2 Node.js apps working with a same data. First app hosts a service to input data (let's call it Contracts). Second app is performing (re)calculations for the Contracts on demand.

I want to trigger re-calculation when I successfully activate the draft so in the input app I'm using

async onAfterContractActicate(res: Contract, req: any): Promise<void> {
        const ID: Contract["ID"] = req.data.ID;

        req.on('succeeded', async () => {
            const srv = await cds.connect.to('ExternalCalculatorService');
            await srv.post(`/Contracts(ID=${ID},IsActiveEntity=true)/calculate`, {});
        });
    }

so the desired logic is:

  1. draft is saved
  2. draft activation triggered - request started
  3. transaction started
  4. active entity is being created / updated
  5. transaction is committed
  6. external re-calculation for the Contract is being called
  7. awaiting external re-calculation - it should return re-calculated Contract
  8. reply with the re-calculated contract

The issue is that the succeeded event is triggered after the response is being prepared and finalised so it's too late to change res or trigger req.reply as it's simply ignored.

The question is - how to get re-calculated data to the object page without weird FE extensions?
I tried

Common.SideEffects #ContractDraftActivated: {
TriggerAction: 'SiteService.draftActivate'
}
but obviously it's not a solution.

entry.title: Re: EHS OCC settings are grouped differently in Prod and...
entry.content: Hi MarK

entry.title: Re: Configuration Steps - Settlement Management in S/4 HANA
entry.content: Yes. This Blog is very useful. Thanks a lot for sharing

entry.title: Re: EHS OCC settings are grouped differently in Prod and...
entry.content: It was exactly the button which is behind this behavior. Strange we been using OCC for years and we just discover this. Many thanks Mark

entry.title: Re: Copying/Migrating data in SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello yves_augustin2
First of all thanks for this blog.


What would be best way to Copying/Migrating data in SAP HANA Cloud from one to another SAP HANA Cloud instance and consolidate data?  

Thanks!

Best Regards,

Masan

entry.title: Re: I can not find /UI5/ABAP_REPOSITORY_SRV in my system.
entry.content: The frontend part for what the /UI5/ABAP_REPOSITORY_SRV service is used needs only be deployed to the frontend server. No need to have it in the backend.

entry.title: Material Codification
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have a client requirement for Material Master codification, the codification must be based on Family, sub family and then an incrementation. 

Example : 

XX - for Family (Eg:10)

YYY - for sub-Family (Eg:100)

ZZZ - for serial number 

--> Material codification must be like this 10100001 

Is It any way to do this requirement in SAP S/4 HANA MM ? 

Thanks in advance. 

Ghassen.
